scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:81002001@rwtrunk.com> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=label:20 a=inactive m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=ptime:20 a=label:10 a=inactive
